_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Mean age for first reliable VA measurement was significantly lower than for VFI (5.4±1.6 yrs vs 7.3±1.0 yrs; p<0.001) and for first reliable GC-IPL measurement compared to pRNFL (5.6±1.5 vs 6.8±1.3; p<0.001)
resourceName: Cirrus HD-OCT device (Cirrus; Carl Zeiss Meditec, Dublin, CA, USA)
details: Mean age for first reliable GC-IPL measurement was significantly lower than for pRNFL (5.6±1.5 vs 6.8±1.3 years; p<0.001), indicating earlier feasibility in young children
